docs.name: Count Up
docs.description: An animated number that counts from a starting value to a target when scrolled into view — essential for metrics and stats sections.

props.name: separator
props.description: Thousands separator. Pass empty string to disable.

docs.overview: CountUp animates a number from a starting value to a target value as it enters the viewport. It supports decimals, prefixes, suffixes, and thousands separators — perfect for stats and metrics sections.

scenarios.title: Stats row
scenarios.description: Display key product metrics that animate in when the user scrolls to them.

scenarios.title: Revenue counter with currency prefix
scenarios.description: Show an animated revenue or savings figure with a dollar sign prefix.
